discrepancies.label: DOI drift between prompt spec §1.A.1 and canonical 2026-05-04 portfolio inventory
discrepancies.halt_evaluation: DOWNGRADED to discrepancy (not HALT_077_SUBSTRATE_DRIFT) per spec §1.A.3 preauthorising on-disk substrate verification.
discrepancies.evidence: 5 of 6 prompt-spec DOIs differ from portfolio_inventory.md (SHA 25B4C96DC15A85A3): PCF-1, PCF-2, CT v1.3, D2-NOTE v2.1, umbrella v2.0. Only T2B (10.5281/zenodo.19915689) matches both anchors.
discrepancies.resolution: All DOI references in 077 deliverables sourced from portfolio_inventory.md (canonical 2026-05-04). Synth review at W21 LANE-1 may surface whether prompt spec or portfolio_inventory should serve as future canonical anchor.

discrepancies.label: 2026-05-07 portfolio-impact assessment is ORAL-OR-TRANSCRIPT-ONLY
discrepancies.halt_evaluation: Spec §1.A.1 acknowledges 'in chat transcript or session-state plan.md' — not a halt because spec admits the artefact may be off-disk.
discrepancies.evidence: Searched siarc-relay-bridge tree for files matching *portfolio*impact*, plan.md, *2026-05-07*assessment*; no on-disk hit. 2026-05-04 portfolio_inventory.md + candidate_dossier.md used as substrate fallback.
discrepancies.resolution: Substrate gap surfaced; bundle profiles fall back to 2026-05-04 anchors. Standalone-strength tags in cross_bundle_compatibility.md E.4 derived from on-disk theorem-count + endorsement-fit, not the missing 2026-05-07 oral assessment.

discrepancies.label: Umbrella v2.0 abstract cites Channel Theory v1.2 (stale)
discrepancies.halt_evaluation: Not a halt; substrate is verbatim umbrella v2.0 main.tex L63.
discrepancies.evidence: Umbrella v2.0 was deposited before CT v1.3 (issued 2026-05-02 per portfolio_inventory.md). Citation chain in umbrella references v1.2 frame; B4 monograph reweave would address.
discrepancies.resolution: Surfaced for synth awareness; 077 dossier does not edit umbrella v2.0 to update the cite (would constitute deposit attempt).

discrepancies.label: T2B Zenodo DOI inconsistency between CMB.txt and portfolio_inventory.md
discrepancies.halt_evaluation: Not a halt; both anchors are on-disk and verifiable.
discrepancies.evidence: CMB.txt L31 shows P-T2B at version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19801038 (older v2.x). portfolio_inventory.md and submission_log.tex Item 10 both anchor 10.5281/zenodo.19915689 (v3.0, 2026-04-30). 077 substrate-anchor uses 19915689 (v3.0) per portfolio_inventory.md as canonical.
discrepancies.resolution: Surfaced for synth-tier review. Suggests CMB.txt L31 should be updated post-W21 cycle independent of 077.

discrepancies.label: Spec §5.E.4 standalone-strength expectation deviates from on-disk substrate
discrepancies.halt_evaluation: Not a halt; spec §5.E.4 anticipated answer is illustrative, not substrate-anchored.
discrepancies.evidence: Spec §5.E.4 anticipates 'PCF-2 v1.3 + D2-NOTE v2.1 both Tier-1 standalone-strong'. On-disk substrate places D2-NOTE v2.1 at HIGH (1 proven theorem + 18/18 verification + closed citation chain v2.1) and PCF-2 v1.3 at PROGRAM-STATEMENT-STANDALONE (no proven theorems internal).
discrepancies.resolution: 077 dossier reports substrate-anchored tags; synth decides at W21 LANE-1 whether spec-anchor or on-disk-substrate-anchor binds.

discrepancies.label: 074 + 075 predecessor sessions in PRE-COMMIT IN-FLIGHT state at 077 fire
discrepancies.halt_evaluation: Not a halt; spec §1.A.3 preauthorises 077 fire on local-assembled predecessor state.
discrepancies.evidence: 074 (T2-PORTFOLIO-CANDIDATE-DOSSIER-ASSEMBLY-074) status LOCAL_ASSEMBLED PRE-COMMIT — assembled in 2026-05-04 session dir but not yet pushed at 077 fire. 075 status LOCAL_ASSEMBLY_NO_HANDOFF PRE-COMMIT.
discrepancies.resolution: 077 dossier independent per spec; 074 + 075 commit cadence does not block 077.
